name: Layere
description: Clean, non-toxic organic wear for women. Layere uses 100% organic cotton for essentials and organic cotton-spandex blends for activewear, with no polyester, nylon, or acrylic in any garment.

products.name: Organic Cotton Sports Bra
products.description: Longline sports bra in 95% organic cotton with built-in inner bra and removable pads, designed for light-to-medium support during pilates, walking, and strength training.

products.name: Organic Cotton Leggings
products.description: Full-length mid-to-high rise leggings in 95% organic cotton with a no-front-seam design and back waistband pocket, ideal for yoga and pilates.

products.name: Organic Cotton Flare Leggings
products.description: Full-length flare leggings in 95% organic cotton with a mid-to-high rise, back waistband pocket, and no-front-seam design for yoga and everyday wear.

products.name: Organic Cotton Cami Top with Built-in Bra
products.description: Longline cami top in 95% organic cotton with a built-in shelf bra, adjustable straps, and removable pads for medium support during everyday wear and light activity.

products.name: 100% Organic Cotton Tank
products.description: Minimal full-length tank top in 100% organic cotton with a scoop neckline and wide straps, designed as a breathable everyday base layer.
